meta_title: Cost of a Giant Inflatable Screen: Prices & Quotes
meta_desc: How much does an inflatable screen cost? What affects the price (size, technology, accessories), approximate price ranges and free quotes — whether buying or hiring.
hero_title: How much does an inflatable screen cost?
hero_desc: There is no one-size-fits-all price: the cost of an inflatable cinema screen depends on its size, the technology used and the accompanying equipment. Here’s what determines the price — and how to get an accurate, free quote within 24 hours.
tout_desc: There are four main factors that affect the price. We’ll explain it to you, straight up.
c1_desc: The first factor: a 3-metre screen and a 16-metre screen are worlds apart. The price rises in line with the projection area.
c2_desc: Continuous-flow, airtight (TPU) fan: every technology has its own price and purpose.
c3_desc: Projectors, sound systems, counterweights, covers: a screen on its own and a complete package are priced differently.
c4_desc: For a one-off event, hiring is often cheaper than buying. See our indicative hire rates.
s1_desc: Desired size, intended use, frequency, location: just a few details are all you need to get started.
s2_desc: We’ll help you choose the right size and technology — without ever trying to upsell you.
s4_desc: Buy or hire, with delivery in France and internationally.
q1: How much does an inflatable screen cost?
a1: Prices vary greatly depending on size and technology. A small auxiliary screen and a 12-metre giant screen for a festival are in completely different price brackets. The simplest solution: request a free quote and we’ll give you an exact price within 24 hours.
q2: Is it better to buy or rent?
a2: If you use it regularly, buying it will pay for itself quickly. For a one-off event, hiring is usually more cost-effective. We can help you decide based on how often you’ll use it.
q3: Is there a charge for the quote?
a3: No. The quote is free and non-binding: just describe your project and we’ll get back to you with a detailed quote.
q4: Does the price include the screening and sound?
a4: It depends on the package. We offer the screen on its own or all-in-one packages that include projection and sound systems. The quote always specifies what is included.
cta_desc: Tell us about your project — size, purpose, location — and we’ll provide you with a free, no-obligation quote.
